title: eleocharis vivipara
intro: Eleocharis vivipara, also known as living grass or viviparous spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Eleocharis vivipara has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, Eleocharis vivipara is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
